title: Crying Obsidian Upgrade
description: Crying Obsidian Upgrade --- A mod that adds a lot of items, food, mechanics. Also adding a new biome, ores and mobs changing the idea of weeping obsidian. The mod also fills the world with different structures.The mod is filled with different content.
body:
## What is this mod and what does it add?:
This mod expands the capabilities of the crying obsidian + adding new ore, biomes, items and armor (the rest you can find in the mod). The mod is quite demanding in terms of performance. Below I left a telegram channel for people from Russia where you can find out when an update of this or that mod comes out.
## Why should I download this mod?:
The mod is filled with its own unique content, but the mod requires persistence and long play to get all the achievements or certain items.
## Where should I look for anything?:
Ore can be found in caves, it is the beginning of the mod. Biome with structures can be found walking around the world (there are also structures that are only in the crying obsidian biome)Some structures can be underground. Structures can also contain items from the mod.
## Will this mod conflict with other mods? And how do I install it?:
The mod does not conflict with anything, there are isolated cases when some mod will interfere with the spawning of mobs, changing the world, which contributes to the removal of a biome, which can also conflict,and also if you installed any mod to expand obsidian or crying obsidian. To install the mod, find the folder ".minecraft" go to it, then go to folder "mods" if you don't have such a folder, then create it and move this mod to the folder, and don't forget to select the loader: forge/neoforge.
### Additional photos and links:
